violations.text: (raw chicken ) was observed thawing in food prep sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
Inspector observed dead flies on hanging glue traps.PIC informed and disposed of traps. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (refrigeration units prep table shelves, and stove hoods ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the ( back outside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
